title: PulteGroup Again Included on PEOPLE's 100 Companies that Care® List
text: ATLANTA--(BUSINESS WIRE)--PulteGroup, Inc. (NYSE: PHM) today announced its recognition on the 2022 PEOPLE Companies that Care® list by Great Place to Work® and PEOPLE magazine. This year the company ranked third among the top 100 companies. title: Homebuilder stocks drop as companies report 8th straight monthly drop in housing sentiment to the lowest reading since start of the pandemic
text: About 1-in-5 homebuilders reported reducing prices to boost sales or limit cancellations, according to the NAHB/Wells Fargo survey.

title: Kimblewick by Del Webb's Highly Anticipated Amenity Center Set to Open Summer 2023
text: INDIANAPOLIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Del Webb, the nation's leading builder of active adult communities for those 55 and older, today announced Kimblewick by Del Webb's highly anticipated clubhouse and amenity center, known as The Carriage House, will grand open at the Indianapolis-area community in Summer 2023. “The Carriage House will have the perfect amount of functional space combined with resort-inspired indoor and outdoor amenities to make it the heart of Kimblewick by Del Webb,” said Scott Mai

title: Del Webb Announces New Active Adult Community in Michigan
text: DETROIT--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Del Webb, the nation's leading builder of active adult communities for those 55 and older, today announced its newest community in southeast Michigan, Kensington Ridge by Del Webb. Grand opening in spring 2023, this age-restricted community will offer resort-style amenities and new ranch home designs from Del Webb's GenYou™ collection in Milford Township.
